chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-830 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Lastly the petition was fixed on 06.10.2025, on such date, same was the position, which reflects that the petitioner has no interest to proceed with the matter. Under the circumstances, instant petition is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
